summary.lv: Accenture meklē SAP ABAP Developer klientu SAP sistēmu izstrādei un konfigurācijai. Darbs Rīgā, atalgojums €1400–5600 mēnesī.
summary.en: Accenture is seeking an SAP ABAP Developer for client SAP system development and configuration, offering a role in Riga with a salary of €1,400–5,600/month.
